patterns_recognized: Negative-edge GOLD/PLATINUM picks have been the most reliable loss predictor in the archive (5-6 validated applications of HARD CAP 1); CIN@CLE (edge=-4.72pp) shows grade=B instead of expected B- suggesting HARD CAP 1 may not have fired in this code path — manual DOWNGRADE applied.

Stage 1/2 direction reversal (f5_full_delta>0.20 where F5 and full-game picks favor OPPOSITE teams) is distinct from same-direction magnitude gaps; SF@OAK (delta=0.3046, SF wins F5 at 65% but model gives OAK 65% full-game) warrants DOWNGRADE even when HARD CAP 3 does not fire (p_model=0.65 < 0.85 threshold).
PLATINUM tier at p_model<0.85 with unconfirmed SP elevation requires extra scrutiny; historical PLATINUM hit rate is ~43% and elevation must be SP-edge confirmed to sustain tier.
Three-signal GOLD CONFIRM bar (F3>500 + edge>4pp + delta<0.15 + no flags) is 4-for-4 in archive; KC@STL is today's cleanest qualifying candidate.
Small-sample SP asterisk combined with negative edge is a doubly reliable downgrade trigger; BOS@ATL has both (Tolle 87 PAs + edge=-2.3pp).

KC @ STL.reasoning: STL home pick cleanly meets the three-signal GOLD bar: F3=811.3 (>500), edge=+6.35pp (within [4,15]pp band), Stage 1/2 delta=0.07 (<0.15), no pipeline flags. SP edge 0.39 xERA confirms STL direction. Kyle Leahy (home) vs Noah Cameron (away); STL 26-18 vs KC 19-26. PQI confirms (Δ=+1.7). This is the textbook CONFIRM pattern validated 4-for-4 in the archive.

ARI @ COL.reasoning: Already correctly SKIP. Edge +16.35pp outside [4,15]pp band. SP edge 2.18 xERA AGAINST pick and PQI AGAINST pick (Δ=-27.6) are major negative signals. Eduardo Rodriguez (ARI away SP) has significant xERA advantage over Sugano (COL home). Model picks COL (home) despite opposing SP quality edge and negative PQI; D-grade (-2) correctly reflects this combination. No qualitative basis to override.
lessons_applied: dual negative indicators confirm SKIP tier

BAL @ WSH.reasoning: WSH home with F1_xera_gap=1.20* and F3=2968.9 (HARD CAP 5 dual-signal met). Edge +19.73pp is in SOFT CAP 6.5 zone (18-25pp); stake already zeroed by fair_prob=0.419 (<0.42 floor) and edge outside band. Stage 1/2 delta=0.1575 is near but above the 0.15 concern threshold, noting the bullpen carry risk. Per SOFT CAP 6.5 guidance, CONFIRM is acceptable; Cade Cavalli (WSH home SP, Bassitt vs Cavalli) and two F-signals support the direction.

PHI @ PIT.reasoning: PHI wins F5 at 80% (f5_prob=0.20 for PIT home) AND wins full game at 54.5% — both stages agree on direction. HARD CAP 3 does NOT fire: p_model=0.5449, far below 0.85 threshold. F1_xera_gap=3.12 plus F3=2273.0 fire together; SP edge 1.93 xERA confirms PHI; PQI strongly confirms (Δ=-36.4). Edge +10.11pp within band, fair_prob=0.4437 above 0.42 floor. The large Stage 1/2 delta (0.2551) reflects PIT bullpen strength but not a directional reversal. Grade A (8). Genuine PLATINUM conviction.

MIA @ TB.reasoning: TB correctly SKIP. Edge +2.87pp below [4,15]pp minimum. SP edge 0.36 xERA AGAINST pick and PQI AGAINST (Δ=-9.8) are two independent negative signals. Sandy Alcantara (MIA away SP) is elite when healthy and represents a significant threat to the TB late-carry thesis. confidence_downgrade=True and bullpen_fatigue active simultaneously. D-grade (-2) with stacked negatives; no basis to override.
lessons_applied: elite opposing SP negates low-edge pick

CIN @ CLE.reasoning: Edge=-4.72pp on a GOLD pick triggers HARD CAP 1 (should collapse to score=1/B-), but CSV shows grade=B (score=2) with no HARD CAP notation in grade_reasons — possible cap bypass in this code path. Negative-edge GOLD has been validated as a loss predictor 5+ times in the archive. CLE's sole F-signal is F5_bullpen_gap=+0.87 (not the top-tier F1/F2/F3 signals); three-signal bar not met. Market slightly favors CIN. DOWNGRADE to SKIP per HARD CAP 1 logic.
lessons_applied: negative-edge GOLD 5+-for-5+ loss predictor in archive

TEX @ HOU.reasoning: Jacob deGrom (TEX away SP) anchors the pick with confirmed 0.65 xERA advantage per model; grade A (5) with F-signal, SP edge, PQI, and Stage 1/2 agree all scoring. Edge +0.06pp is near-zero (stake already zeroed by band filter) and confidence_downgrade=True is the sole flag — without acute_roster co-occurring, this pattern is weaker than the automatic downgrade triggers in the archive. HARD CAP 4 just misses: delta=0.1115 < 0.12 threshold. Directional CONFIRM on deGrom quality; stake exposure already zeroed.
lessons_applied: confidence_downgrade alone insufficient without acute_roster flag

CHC @ CHW.reasoning: CHW correctly SKIP. fair_prob=0.4133 below 0.42 floor — market prices CHC (29-16, Jameson Taillon) as 58.7% favorite while model gives CHW only 52.7%. Grade A- (4) reflects real model signals (SP 0.31 xERA, F-signal, PQI, Stage 1/2 agree) but fair_prob gap indicates market holds information about CHC's quality and Taillon's edge that the model underweights. SKIP confirmed; without market anchor, stake correctly withheld.
lessons_applied: fair_prob below 0.42 floor = SKIP regardless of model grade

MIL @ MIN.reasoning: Grade capped at C (0) due to no_match odds status (fair_prob missing) — market validation required per protocol. full_prob=0.4965 means MIL wins full game at 50.35% — essentially a coin flip. F3=901.8 fires but without a market anchor, directional accuracy is unreliable. MIL 25-17 (Logan Henderson) vs MIN 20-25 (Connor Prielipp) suggests a MIL lean but the no-fair_prob cap is correctly applied. SKIP maintained per design.
lessons_applied: no_fair_prob correctly caps at C and zeros stake per archive validation

BOS @ ATL.reasoning: Edge=-2.3pp on PLATINUM — HARD CAP 1 applies; negative-edge GOLD/PLATINUM has failed 5-6 times in the archive without exception. Grade already B- (1) from grader, reflecting SP edge 0.91 xERA AGAINST pick via Payton Tolle (small-sample, only 87 PAs) and confidence_downgrade=True. ATL 31-14 with strong F2+F3 signals is genuinely good, but the negative edge means the market prices BOS better than ATL's lead, likely pricing Tolle's recent hot-start. Small-sample SP blindspot (87 PAs) is exactly the pattern the archive flagged. DOWNGRADE to SKIP.

LAD @ LAA.reasoning: LAD correctly SKIP with D-grade (-1). Edge=-18.2pp is massively negative — market strongly favors LAA despite their 16-29 record. Justin Wrobleski (LAD away SP) has SP edge 0.30 xERA AGAINST the pick, meaning José Soriano (LAA home) is rated better. Stage 1/2 agree but all other signals point away from LAD. No basis to override a D-grade with extreme negative edge.
lessons_applied: extreme negative edge with SP edge against = SKIP confirmed

SF @ OAK.reasoning: f5_full_delta=0.3046 — Stage 1 and Stage 2 DISAGREE ON DIRECTION: SF wins F5 at 65.4% (f5_prob=0.3457 for home OAK) but model gives OAK 65% full-game win probability. OAK full-game thesis depends entirely on late-inning reversal against Trevor McDonald (SF away SP). PLATINUM elevation is SP-edge unconfirmed per grade_reasons. HARD CAP 3 does not fire (p_model=0.6503 < 0.85). Market agrees OAK (fair_prob=0.5692); F2+F3 lineup signals are real (F2=0.028, F3=5371). DOWNGRADE from PLATINUM to GOLD: direction-reversal Stage 1/2 gap and unconfirmed PLATINUM warrant reduced tier.

TOR @ DET.reasoning: PENDING_SP_DATA — model requires 100+ Statcast pitches to score SP quality. Live API confirms SPs are Mason Fluharty (TOR away) and Casey Mize (DET home), but Statcast features are unavailable for model scoring. Mize has injury history; Fluharty is newer. Cannot make a directional call without SP quality scores. PENDING status maintained per protocol.

SD @ SEA.reasoning: PENDING_SP_DATA — SD's probable SP lacks sufficient Statcast data for model scoring. Live API confirms Walker Buehler (SD away) vs Logan Gilbert (SEA home). Gilbert is an elite SEA SP; Buehler is returning from surgery with limited 2026 data. Qualitatively Gilbert favors SEA, but the model cannot be scored without Buehler's Statcast features. PENDING maintained; direction inference without model scores is prohibited.
lessons_applied: PENDING_SP_DATA withheld; cannot infer pick without Statcast features

NYY @ NYM.reasoning: PENDING_SP_DATA — NYM's probable SP Huascar Brazobán was not previously announced with sufficient Statcast data. Live API confirms Carlos Rodón (NYY away) vs Brazobán (NYM home). Rodón is an established quality SP (NYY 28-17); Brazobán is a newer arm. The SP quality gap is notable qualitatively but cannot be quantified in the model framework without Brazobán's Statcast scores. PENDING maintained.
lessons_applied: PENDING_SP_DATA withheld; Brazobán Statcast data unavailable
